## ConstraintTagRegistration.isApplicableToType property

Optional precise applicability predicate for the field type being parsed. When omitted, the target custom constraint registration controls type applicability during validation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly isApplicableToType?: (type: ExtensionApplicableType) => boolean;
```
